# Improve Dashboard Performance

## Overview
The dashboard is slow. Make it faster.

## Tasks

### 1. Optimize database queries
Make the database queries more efficient.

### 2. Add caching
Cache things that are slow.

### 3. Optimize frontend rendering
Make the frontend render faster. Reduce unnecessary re-renders.

### 4. Improve loading experience
Make the loading experience feel better for users.

### 5. Optimize bundle size
Reduce the JavaScript bundle size.

## Success Criteria
- Dashboard feels faster
- Users are happier with performance
- No regressions
